dungeon: Epic Septavius the Ghost God fight (grey crypt arena) + galactic farming — 'Angel's Touch' stream
map: DOCUMENTED: grey diagonal-walled MARBLE/CRYPT dungeon (Lost-Halls-style) with RED BLOOD/gore splatter zones = Septavius's arena. Also a vault screen, sandy + dark-purple transition areas.

bosses.name: Epic Septavius the Ghost God (EPIC ENEMY variant)

attacks: throws GRENADES ('How about a few grenades?!')

bosses.note: EPIC-tier variant (validates the D1 Epic Enemies system on a named boss). These are the COMPLETE/CORRECTED Septavius taunts — supersedes the clipped guesses in disc_B4dLdyMZkH0 ('few greater minions' was actually 'few grenades?!').

drops: Special Crate -> [Leg of Doom] (and other crate items)
mechanics: DOCUMENTED: confirms EPIC ENEMIES (D1) apply to named bosses — 'Epic Septavius the Ghost God'. CORRECTED/COMPLETED Septavius taunt set (grenades, 'another wave of my deadly attacks', 'cannot stay immortal forever' = the immortal->vulnerable phase). Galactic /30 counter ('<Hydra> The Pulse has been defeated! (8/30)'). Special Crate unboxing ('[player] just unboxed a Special Crate, obtaining a [Leg of Doom]'). Announcer persona: Hydra.
